messages.message: `@builderbot/bot` import should occur before import of `@jest/globals`

fix.text:
import { utils } from '@builderbot/bot'
import { beforeEach, describe, expect, jest, test } from '@jest/globals'

messages.message: `node:crypto` import should occur after import of `mime-types`

fix.text:
import { createReadStream } from 'node:fs'
import { stat } from 'node:fs/promises'
import { resolve } from 'node:path'

import { ProviderClass, utils } from '@builderbot/bot'
import { Vendor } from '@builderbot/bot/dist/provider/interface/provider'
import { BotContext, Button, SendOptions } from '@builderbot/bot/dist/types'
import axios, { AxiosInstance } from 'axios'
import mime from 'mime-types'
import { randomUUID } from 'node:crypto'

messages.message: `node:fs` import should occur after import of `mime-types`

fix.text:
import { stat } from 'node:fs/promises'
import { resolve } from 'node:path'

import { ProviderClass, utils } from '@builderbot/bot'
import { Vendor } from '@builderbot/bot/dist/provider/interface/provider'
import { BotContext, Button, SendOptions } from '@builderbot/bot/dist/types'
import axios, { AxiosInstance } from 'axios'
import mime from 'mime-types'
import { createReadStream } from 'node:fs'

messages.message: `node:fs/promises` import should occur after import of `mime-types`

fix.text:
import { resolve } from 'node:path'

import { ProviderClass, utils } from '@builderbot/bot'
import { Vendor } from '@builderbot/bot/dist/provider/interface/provider'
import { BotContext, Button, SendOptions } from '@builderbot/bot/dist/types'
import axios, { AxiosInstance } from 'axios'
import mime from 'mime-types'
import { stat } from 'node:fs/promises'

messages.message: There should be no empty line within import group
`node:path` import should occur after import of `mime-types`

fix.text:
import { ProviderClass, utils } from '@builderbot/bot'
import { Vendor } from '@builderbot/bot/dist/provider/interface/provider'
import { BotContext, Button, SendOptions } from '@builderbot/bot/dist/types'
import axios, { AxiosInstance } from 'axios'
import mime from 'mime-types'
import { resolve } from 'node:path'
